case_title: GOULD JEFFREY PIERCE JR. VS ANGSTENBERGER MANFRED F.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $326.10 FILED BY GOULD JEFFREY PIERCE JR. AS TO DEFENDANT ANGSTENBERGER MANFRED F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANGSTENBERGER MANFRED F.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOULD JEFFREY PIERCE JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGSTENBERGER MANFRED F. $326.10 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $376.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANGSTENBERGER MANFRED F.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $407.92 AS TO DEFENDANT ANGSTENBERGER MANFRED F.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ANGSTENBERGER MANFRED F.
